issues.message: The PrefixIcon fix is not fully applied in the example: this renders a bare `<IconSparkleFill />` inside `PageBanner.Body`, so the `prefixIcon` slot tokens (size/margin/color) are not wired. Upstream source truth exposes the generic `PrefixIcon` helper (`@seed-design/react`) or, at minimum, requires `className="seed-prefix-icon"`.

Round-1 fix #9 is still incomplete: `skeleton.md` does have a `States` section now, but the section order still violates the shared component template/1F ordering (`Variants -> States -> Props`). `Props` appears before `States` here.
